title_working: Michael Milken: Genius, or the Face of Greed?
warnings: R3 LIVING person who PLEADED GUILTY (April 1990, six felony counts) and was later PARDONED (Feb 18, 2020). Strictly record-based and neutral. NEVER say 'convicted at trial', 'convicted of insider trading', or 'convicted of racketeering/RICO'. Always distinguish CHARGED (98 counts, incl. RICO) from PLEADED (6 counts); RICO + 92 counts dropped.

The 2020 pardon is clemency, NOT innocence/exoneration: the guilty plea STANDS and the SEC LIFETIME industry BAN was NOT lifted. The genius-vs-greed debate must stay ATTRIBUTED ('critics argue / defenders argue'), never settled fact.
Visuals: NO real-person likeness of anyone, NO real logos/seals, NO readable text in images (Remotion adds text). Symbolic reconstruction only.
Left-process only (Claude): topic/research/claims/script. Codex owns scenes/visuals/audio/edit/render.
Narration sized at measured ~173 wpm (~24.4 min) to fill ~27-33 min runtime with hook montage, OP/ED bookends, music beats and the CTA hold; validator estimates at 150 wpm (~28.2 min, in mid band).

Durable source content hashes PENDING (capture before publish; non-blocking). Final-script approval is an OWNER gate: APR-0001 is PENDING (not self-approved). Before broadcast: re-confirm the subject is living and lock verbatim White House / court / SEC quotes.
